_meta.name: gadmin-list-groups
_meta.description: List all Google Groups in Admin console. Groups table: Group name, Email address, Members, Access type.
anomalies: No H1/H2 headings — Google uses custom elements for page titles
Table headers doubled like users page: 'Group nameGroup name Group name...'
Per-row action buttons are in perceive.buttons not mainActions: 'View', 'Add members', 'Manage members', 'Edit settings', 'More options ↓DELETE GROUP'
DELETE GROUP is concatenated into 'More options' button text — not a separate button
2 rows in default org (standard Google Workspace groups)

chain.note: Google Admin groups path. Hard-code full URL.

Table headers: ['', 'Group nameGroup name...', 'Email addressEmail address...', 'MembersMembers', 'Access typeAccess type', '']. rowCount=2 in default org. Buttons per row: View, Add members, Manage members, Edit settings, More options/DELETE.

create-group-button.description: Button to create a new group
create-group-button.note: Confirmed via perceive buttons: 'Create group'. CSS selector confidence low — use click_text('Create group') as fallback.
